golden_cases.notes: Guild hub screen and check-in button states.

notes: Specification-only blueprint for a future guild check-in UI task.

task_manifest.entry_condition: Guild panel is reachable through deterministic menu navigation and the account belongs to a guild.
task_manifest.failure_condition: Guild hub, check-in affordance, or success state cannot be verified in the allowed retries.
task_manifest.name: Guild Check-In

stop_conditions.message: Guild check-in fixture exceeded task-side timeout.
Expected guild anchors did not match stable UI.

task_manifest.success_condition: Guild check-in success state or already-claimed state is visible without actionable check-in controls.
